title: Momonosuke’s Burden
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on momonosuke’s burden within the Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke's dad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Went with gold. Roger to Rafiel!?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The shocking truth! What exactly is the relationship between the one piece and the Wano Country!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: your dad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was part of the pirate King's Crew!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: One of the few that learned the secret of this world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes. I know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just like Rayleigh...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: We... We learned all of the history of this world ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I see.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So this "secret of the world" is what they were trying to weasel out of you!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Kaidou's underlings, Doflamingo, and Caesar, I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's why they were trying to hunt you down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Your logic is sound. The thing is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Lord often decided not to burden us with that secret.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We do not know anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And even if we did, we would never speak on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: At any rate, whether or not we do or don't know, our enemies still pursue us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So the only choice we have...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is to Fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Lord Open left us with these words:

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: We, those who should have been Lord Oden's shields...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: By some twist of fate, we ended up being the ones protected by him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now that we bear the shame of living on without our LORD, we must do but one thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stake our lives upon seeking justice for him!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: That is, kill the Shogun of the Wano Country,

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: And open the borders of the country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That is our true desire!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Right now, the Wano Country is being oppressed by both the Shogun and Kaidou, who have joined forces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OH MY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: though those that harbor sentiments of rebellion have begun to gather,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Compared to the great armies of the enemy, we are but puddles before the ocean! We have no hope of winning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yet win we must!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thus we left on our voyage... to find comrades- in-arms to fight with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We first set our sights on zoo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes. The Kouzuki clan and the MINK Races have, since time immemorial,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: vowed to share in each others' fates.

summary: Momonosuke’s Burden: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
